description: One consolidated finding raised by 2 reviewers with a one-level severity disagreement (high vs medium). Stage 5 applies max severity without invoking the judge step.

consolidated_findings.title: Weak signature algorithm used in token validation
consolidated_findings.description: The validateToken function uses HS256 which is considered weak for high-security contexts; RS256 or ES256 is recommended.

notes.gap_explanation: high=3, medium=2 → gap of 1 level. Threshold is 2, so judge step NOT triggered.
notes.max_rule: When gap < threshold, Stage 5 takes the max severity: high wins over medium.
notes.range_population: severity_range always populated when severities differ: {min: medium, max: high}
notes.reasoning_null: severity_reasoning is null when no judge step fires
